data.name: Drugged-up Sex with a Self Destructive Girl! ~Fucking her sugar daddy to support the guys she worships! Overdosing on pills during sex~
data.detailed_description:
This subculture babe absolutely adores her favorite stars.
Today, she's fucking her sugar daddy to make money... with no emotion, of course.

But there's one thing that will change her attitude... drugs.
When she draws closer, so does her voice, and the higher she gets and the harder you bang her, the wilder she becomes!

We hope you enjoy this erotic "jirai" babe and drugged sex combination featuring high-quality Live2D anime in game format.

Details

This is a short visual anime where you can enjoy drugged-up sex with a hot fashion subculture babe with simple controls.
Choose between the indifferent Sugar Daddy edition and the flirty fangirling Worshipful edition! You can also enjoy both in Free mode!

Slip her some pills and get your thrills!

The more she takes, the looser she gets, until her mind goes blank in an ecstatic overdose.

Up-close and Personal

She'll hold you tight and kiss you in this game!
And of course, the closer she gets, the closer she sounds - all the better for a more realistic experience! Her kisses change as she takes more pills too!

Jirai-chan

CV: Aino Mimori

This babe with no self-esteem will do absolutely ANYTHING for her fave.
Even dabbling in sugar dating to fuel her fandom.
While she's sugaring, she's as cold as ice, but in front of her fave, she's the complete opposite.
When you add drugs to the mix, her reasoning goes out the window, and her sensitivity flies off the charts!

Sugar Daddy Edition

She's working hard for the money to get closer to her fave.
If you ain't got the cash, she won't give you her "love".
She uses her bangin' bod to secure clients for her sugar dating,
and suffers through the affections of her older customers...

"I really wish this would hurry up and end."

No matter how much effort you put into pounding her, she'll always look at you with disdain.
But... offer her some drugs, and...

Worshipful Edition

Flirty, fawning sex with the man she worships!

"I'd die if you ever abandoned me."

In order to give him every penny she has, she resorted to sugar dating.
She loves him so much, she can't even look him in the eye.

"Don't leave me." "Love me." "If you don't, I'd rather disappear."

Get a taste of her unstable desperation.
But... offer her some drugs, and...

Options

  • Outfit options: Clothed, Naked

  • Cross-section views ON or OFF

  • Mask ON or OFF

  • Pubic hair ON or OFF

  • Camera Frame

Free Mode Exclusive Options

  • Adjust the amount of drugs

  • Sweat ON or OFF

  • Heart eyes ON or OFF

  • Thrust speed control

  • Ejaculation timing control (different lines depending on the speed)

  • Creampie reaction variations (Checked-out Ver., Drugged-up Ver.)

*This game has a short playtime.
